roles.roleSummary: 力成為台灣最大記憶體封測廠，6月營收76.2億年增21.7%，累計444億年增32.4%。受惠DRAM/NAND封測需求回升與HBM測試動能，先進封裝賦能角色明確。
products: WLCSP晶圓級封裝(Wafer Level Chip Scale Package)
HBM堆疊封裝測試(TSV Through Silicon Via)
risks: 記憶體封測價格競爭，HBM測試技術門檻高但同業跟進

evidence.title: Chip Probing
evidence.claim: Chip Probing supports 力成 role as memory_logic_packaging_testing_provider in 先進封裝與 CoWoS through disclosed product/service scope.

evidence.title: Final Test
evidence.claim: Final Test supports 力成 role as memory_logic_packaging_testing_provider in 先進封裝與 CoWoS through disclosed product/service scope.

evidence.title: Wafer Level Packaging
evidence.claim: Wafer Level Packaging supports 力成 role as memory_logic_packaging_testing_provider in 先進封裝與 CoWoS through disclosed product/service scope.

evidence.title: Flip Chips
evidence.claim: Flip Chips supports 力成 role as memory_logic_packaging_testing_provider in 先進封裝與 CoWoS through disclosed product/service scope.

techFocus: 記憶體IC堆疊封裝測試(TSV矽穿孔)
HBM封裝後測試與良率篩選技術
